notes:
Bro Scores 1.8.0
• Timeline is now a full typed feed (goals, cards, subs, fouls, corners, shots…) with a Key events / All toggle
• Live clock fixed — no longer sticks behind the real minute
• Push alerts now fire for your teams even with the app closed (goals, cards, penalties, kickoff/HT/FT & more)
• Enable notifications when asked so alerts reach you
